institution.name: University of Puerto Rico at Cayey

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 41% at University of Puerto Rico at Cayey vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.2k vs 3.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Puerto Rico at Cayey rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Puerto Rico at Cayey rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Puerto Rico at Cayey fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.9% → 0.0%).
